news.headline: Ted Cruz's proposal for Federal Reserve is a big distraction, according to sources.

news.summary: Garmin, a leading marine electronics manufacturer, unveiled the GPSMAP® 15x3 chartplotter on June 12, 2025, in Olathe, Kansas. This new device offers an ultrawide display and simplified design to enhance the user experience. Garmin, listed on the NYSE under ticker symbol GRMN, is recognized as the largest and most innovative company in the marine electronics industry. This latest chartplotter model aims to provide a more streamlined and immersive navigation experience for users.
news.headline: Garmin introduces GPSMAP 15x3 chartplotter with 15" ultrawide display for streamlined experience at the helm.

news.summary: A recent survey conducted in Portland, Oregon revealed that just 25% of employees feel strongly that their employers prioritize their well-being. The study, conducted in June 2025, highlighted a concerning decline in employee well-being and mental health compared to the previous year. The findings suggest that a significant number of employees believe their organizations do not prioritize their well-being, pointing to a potential disconnect between employers and their workforce.
news.headline: Employee mental health declining, with only 1 in 4 feeling employer support; well-being and mental health declining over the past year. (chars: 115)

news.summary: A breakthrough oral treatment for hypertrophic cardiomyopathy in cats has received conditional approval from the FDA, marking a significant milestone in feline medicine. Pegasus Laboratories/PRN Pharmacal unveiled this innovative option on June 12, 2025, in Pensacola, Florida. The treatment is the first of its kind and is poised to revolutionize the management of this condition. This development signals a new era in veterinary medicine, offering hope and improved quality of life for feline patients.
news.headline: Felycin®-CA1 gets FDA conditional approval as first oral option for feline heart disease, changing feline medicine.

news.summary: Transat A.T. Inc. reported strong financial results for the second quarter of 2025. Revenue increased by 5.9% to $1,031.1 million compared to last year, with Adjusted EBITDA reaching $98.4 million. The net loss was $22.9 million, an improvement from $54.4 million. Free cash flow amounted to $142.3 million, showing a positive trend. Cash and cash equivalents stood at $532.6 million. The company's Elevation Program aims to deliver an annualized adjusted EBITDA run rate of $67.0 million. Additionally, a debt restructuring agreement was reached to reduce debt incurred during the COVID-19 pandemic. Key metrics for the six-month period showed revenue growth, increased capacity, and improved cash flow. Future expectations include an available capacity increase of 1.0% for fiscal year 2025. Transat remains focused on its business strategy and operational optimization to drive long-term profitability.
news.headline: Transat A.T. Inc. reports Q2 revenue of $1.03B, up 5.9% YoY, EBITDA of $98.4M, free cash flow of $142.3M, net loss of $22.9M. Elevation Program aims for $67M annualized adjusted EBITDA. Reached agreement to restructure LEEFF debt. Cash and cash equivalents at $532.6M. Financial results show revenue growth and productivity, strengthening balance sheet. Summer load factors slightly lower, 1.7% higher airline unit revenues expected for FY 2025.

news.headline: BingX launches Copy Trading 2.0, offering more control and transparency. Upgrade to popular social trading system.

news.summary: The company has set ambitious financial goals for 2028, including a gross written premium exceeding $2 billion, adjusted net income surpassing $125 million, and adjusted return on equity higher than 18%. In addition, they have revealed a strategic collaboration with Westwood Insurance Agency, a subsidiary of The Baldwin Group, to notably widen their market presence.
news.headline: Hippo reveals 2028 targets: Gross written premium over $2B, adjusted net income over $125M, adjusted ROE over 18%. Partnership with Westwood Insurance Agency.

news.summary: In Toronto on June 12, 2025, IsoEnergy Ltd. (NYSE: ISOU) (TSX: ISO) announced the launch of its summer exploration program covering its eastern Athabasca Basin uranium properties. The program is set to span across 24 sites, marking a significant step in the Company's ongoing initiatives in the region.
news.headline: IsoEnergy begins summer 2025 exploration at Athabasca Basin with program covering 24 uranium properties.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in Redwood City, California, Synthego, a leading CRISPR Solutions provider, revealed that the US Court of Appeals for the Federal Circuit has confirmed a previous decision that nullified patents owned by Agilent Technologies, Inc. This outcome is a significant development for the industry, as it impacts the patents in question and upholds the ruling. The ruling can be viewed for further details.
news.headline: Synthego wins patent appeal against Agilent, invalidating CRISPR patents. US Court of Appeals rules in their favor.

news.summary: In Holon, Israel on June 12, 2025, Compugen Ltd. disclosed ground-breaking findings in AI and machine learning predictive computational research. The company, listed on Nasdaq as CGEN and TASE as CGEN, is a leading cancer immunotherapy company known for its innovative approach to computational target discovery. This announcement marks a significant milestone in their clinical-stage advancements in the field of cancer research.
news.headline: Compugen (Nasdaq: CGEN) to present AI/ML research at scientific conferences, focused on cancer immunotherapy.

news.summary: A cybersecurity expert with extensive experience at top companies like Palo Alto Networks, Twitter, and Rubrik is joining Upwind, a leading cloud security provider, as the industry moves towards prioritizing real-time protection. The announcement was made in San Francisco on June 12, 2025. This move is expected to bolster Upwind's position in the market as they focus on scaling their operations in response to the evolving cybersecurity landscape.
news.headline: Upwind hires Rinki Sethi as CSO; aims to advance runtime security revolution with her exec expertise from Palo Alto Networks, Twitter, Rubrik.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 12, 2025, Luca Mining Corp. announced that Mr. Ramon Mendoza, the current interim Chief Operating Officer, will transition to the permanent COO position starting from June. The Company's stock is listed on TSX Venture Exchange as LUCA, on OTCQX as LUCMF, and on Frankfurt as Z68.
news.headline: Luca Mining Corp. announces leadership growth, with Ramon Mendoza taking permanent COO role as of June.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, GK8 by Galaxy announced a collaboration with Polymesh, a layer-1 blockchain designed for regulated assets, to offer institutional-level custody and secure staking services for POLYX, the native token of Polymesh. Through GK8's product range, institutions can access enhanced security measures for managing and staking their assets, marking a significant advancement in the blockchain industry.
news.headline: GK8 by Galaxy teams with Polymesh to offer secure staking and custody, enhancing POLYX token services.

news.summary: In Merced, California on June 12, 2025, the University of California, Merced Division of Professional & Continuing Education (UC Merced PACE) announced their partnership with Eduframe by Drieam. This collaboration aims to enhance the efficiency of UC Merced PACE's operations to support scaling efforts.
news.headline: UC Merced PACE chooses Eduframe to enhance Professional & Continuing Education ops for efficiency.

news.summary: Corero Network Security (AIM: CNS) (OTCQX: DDOSF), a leading provider of distributed denial of service (DDoS) protection, has revealed a new partnership with Rocket Fibre, a rapidly expanding UK broadband company. The agreement, spanning multiple years, aims to bolster Rocket Fibre's network defenses and security measures. This collaboration marks a significant step in safeguarding Rocket Fibre's infrastructure against potential cyber threats.
news.headline: Corero Network Security partners with Rocket Fibre for multi-year deal to enhance DDoS protection services.

news.summary: In New York on June 12, 2025, Qodo, an AI coding platform focusing on quality, shared findings from a survey of 600 developers. The survey highlighted a confidence issue within the coding community despite the prevalence of AI tools. The results showed that 82% of developers employ AI coding assistants, showing a significant reliance on such technology.
news.headline: Survey by Qodo shows 78% productivity improvement from AI coding tools, but 66% developers note lack of critical context.

news.summary: The former FSB Chair, Klaas Knot, highlighted that the integration of stablecoins and ETFs into traditional finance is fueling the rapid advancement of cryptocurrencies. He expressed worries about the increased systemic risks due to this integration.
news.headline: FSB warns: Crypto reaching 'tipping point' as links to TradFi deepen. Stablecoins and ETFs pose risk, says outgoing Chair Knot.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in La Jolla, California, CalciMedica Inc. (NASDAQ: CALC), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, is concentrating on creating innovative therapies that inhibit calcium release-activated calcium (CRAC) channels for both acute and chronic inflammatory conditions.
news.headline: CalciMedica to present at nephrology meeting in Vicenza. Company focused on CRAC channel therapies.

news.summary: An over-subscribed funding round has successfully backed Muon Space, a prominent provider of comprehensive space systems, in the acquisition of propulsion technology, the establishment of a new manufacturing plant, and the expansion of production capacity to satisfy increasing customer needs. The company, based in Mountain View, California, made this development public on June 12, 2025. The exact figures and details about the funding amount, propulsion technology acquisition, the new manufacturing facility, and the scale-up of production were not specified in the news release.
news.headline: Muon Space raises $146M in Series B funding for satellite constellations, propulsion acquisition, and scale-up.

news.summary: Miami, FL - On June 12, 2025, Heven, a prominent company specializing in hydrogen-fueled drones, revealed the selection of Michael Buscher as the President of U.S. Operations. Tasked with spearheading Heven's expansion initiatives within the country, Buscher will be responsible for overseeing operational activities, implementing growth strategies, and managing U.S. defense operations.
news.headline: Heven appoints Michael Buscher as President of U.S. Operations. He will lead domestic growth strategy and defense initiatives.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, ShipBob, a top supply chain and fulfillment platform for small and mid-sized omnichannel retailers, unveiled the national rollout of zone skipping services. This offering includes advanced tracking and visibility features through its exclusive technology.
news.headline: ShipBob introduces Zone Skipping in U.S. to boost supply chain efficiency, offering enhanced visibility and tracking nationwide.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Nexar, a prominent provider of AI-driven mobility solutions, revealed a significant partnership with Flywheel, the top e-hail platform for taxis in the country. This collaboration will involve the implementation of Nexar's advanced connected dash cameras across their fleet.
news.headline: Nexar & Flywheel partner to update taxis with connected tech; deploying Nexar dash cameras across industry.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in San Francisco, it was reported that SamaCare, a specialty medication patient access platform operating in the cloud, has achieved a significant milestone by successfully resolving over 1 million prior authorizations for specialty practices. This accomplishment emphasizes the effectiveness of SamaCare in streamlining processes for healthcare providers. By combining artificial intelligence with human knowledge, SamaCare has established itself as a valuable tool in the industry for managing prior authorizations efficiently.
news.headline: SamaCare hits 1 million prior authorizations for specialty meds using AI, making process faster and accurate.

news.summary: The advanced smartwatch, Venu® X1, introduced by Garmin in Olathe, Kan., on June 12, 2025, is leading the trend in the market. It features lightweight materials, a built-in speaker, microphone, and LED flashlight. This innovative product from Garmin, listed on the NYSE as GRMN, is making waves with its ultrathin design, marking a new standard in the smartwatch sector.
news.headline: Garmin unveils Venu X1 smartwatch with innovative features like 2-inch display, mic, speaker, LED flashlight. #Garmin #smartwatch

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Churchill Resources Inc. (TSXV: CRI) reported successful due-diligence sampling at the Frost Cove Antimony mine and the Stewart Gold mine on its Black Raven property. Samples from Frost Cove showed 35.1% antimony and Stewart Gold had 29.7% antimony and 14.4 g/t gold. These results exceeded the lab's detection limits, with the antimony veins spanning 800m on the surface. Historical samples also indicated high antimony levels. Importantly, these values are not NI 43-101 compliant and neither mine has been drilled yet.
news.headline: Churchill Resources reports very high-grade results of 35.1% and 29.7% antimony and 14.4 g/t gold at Black Raven site in Newfoundland.

news.summary: Fort Mill, South Carolina - On June 12, 2025, Catheter Precision, Inc. (NYSE/American: VTAK), a prominent U.S. medical device company specializing in advanced products for the cardiac electrophysiology sector, revealed that their LockeT sales for the second quarter of 2025 are projected to reach record levels. The figures indicate a significant upturn, with sales already exceeding those of the same period in 2024 by an impressive 200%. This robust performance signifies a substantial growth trajectory for the company's product in the competitive market of cardiac electrophysiology.
news.headline: LockeT catheter sales by Catheter Precision are booming, with Q2 2025 sales up 200% compared to Q2 2024.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Abaxx Technologies Inc. unveiled a new smarter market infrastructure for precious metals, including the release of Gold Kilobar Futures contract on Abaxx Exchange. Abaxx, a financial software and market infrastructure firm, is the majority stakeholder of Abaxx Singapore Pte. Ltd., which operates the Abaxx Commodity Futures Exchange and Clearinghouse. Additionally, Abaxx launched Abaxx Spot¹, a physically-allocated gold trading platform in Singapore. The company also produces the SmarterMarkets™ Podcast. The Gold Kilobar Futures contract is set to revolutionize trading in precious metals and offers new opportunities for investors.
news.headline: Abaxx launches gold kilobar futures contract & Abaxx Spot Gold Pool in Singapore. Enhancing precious metals market infrastructure.

news.summary: Canstar has entered into a Letter of Intent (LOI) with TerraAI, a company funded by Khosla Ventures, to utilize artificial intelligence in an exploration Joint Venture (JV) worth $11.5 million at the Buchans and Mary March projects located in Newfoundland.
news.headline: Canstar partners with TerraAI, backed by Khosla Ventures, for $11.5M exploration JV in Newfoundland.

news.summary: Today, in Longboat Key, Florida, Rumble (NASDAQ: RUM) announced the appointment of Ben Torres Ezrick as its inaugural Chief Marketing Officer. Ezrick, a seasoned marketing professional in the tech, content, and agency fields, will play a crucial role in Rumble's expansion strategy to attract new viewers and clients. Rumble aims to enhance its position as a multimedia platform, cloud service provider, and soon-to-be host of a secure crypto wallet.
news.headline: Rumble appoints Ben Torres Ezrick, former Zoom and Google marketer, as first CMO to fuel growth efforts.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, I-Mab, a leading biotech company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol IMAB, made an announcement from Rockville, Maryland. The company, specializing in precision immuno-oncology treatments for cancer, shared that on June 11, 2025, it received notification from NASDAQ regarding its compliance with the minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 per share under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). As per the notification, I-Mab has successfully met this requirement. Consequently, the Company's American Depositary Shares (ADSs) will remain listed and tradable on the NASDAQ stock exchange.
news.headline: I-Mab complies with Nasdaq's $1.00 minimum bid price rule on June 11, 2025, maintaining listing for its ADSs.

news.summary: In a recent study, a CR+CRh rate of 26% (20 out of 77) and an ORR of 48% (37 out of 77) were reported in the pivotal efficacy evaluation of relapsed/refractory mNPM1 acute myeloid leukemia population.
news.headline: Syndax presents 26% CR rate and 48% ORR in mNPM1 AML from AUGMENT-101 Trial at EHA 2025.

news.summary: In the first quarter of fiscal year 2026, there was a 4.3% rise in net sales compared to the same period in fiscal year 2025, reaching a total of $138.4 million.
news.headline: Lovesac Co. Q1 FY26 net sales up 4.3% to $138.4 million compared to Q1 FY25.

news.summary: A recent study, the PoNS Therapeutic Experience Program (PoNSTEP), has shown persistent positive outcomes of PoNS Therapy® on enhancing gait deficits in individuals with Multiple Sclerosis. The research revealed long-lasting benefits, with a significant improvement in mobility over the long term. This indicates the potential for sustained progress in walking ability among MS patients through the use of PoNS Therapy®. The findings offer promising results for individuals dealing with mobility challenges due to Multiple Sclerosis, highlighting the effectiveness of this therapy in addressing gait deficits.
news.headline: Long-term benefits of PoNS Therapy shown in study at Consortium of Multiple Sclerosis Centers Annual Meeting.

news.summary: A poster was presented at the EULAR 2025 Congress showcasing the utilization of Purified Cortrophin® Gel in a murine collagen-induced arthritis mouse model. This presentation highlighted the potential benefits of using Purified Cortrophin® Gel in treating arthritis.
news.headline: ANI Pharmaceuticals presents data on Cortrophin® Gel for arthritis at EULAR 2025 Congress in a mouse model poster.

news.summary: In Memphis, Tennessee on June 12, 2025, AutoZone (NYSE: AZO) honored 18 top suppliers during its annual Vendor Summit. These awards celebrate firms that have displayed outstanding performance and steadfast dedication to customer satisfaction throughout the previous year.
news.headline: AutoZone honors 18 suppliers at Vendor Summit for outstanding performance, customer satisfaction commitment.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Electra Battery Materials Corporation (NASDAQ: ELBM; TSX-V: ELBM) and the Three Fires Group revealed promising advancements in the Aki Battery Recycling joint venture, marking the inception of Canada's initial Indigenous-run lithium-ion battery recycling project. Known as Aki, this initiative is at the forefront of creating an eco-friendly, closed-loop system to handle battery disposal. By bolstering local supply chains and lessening the need for overseas processing facilities, Aki strives to address the rising issue of battery waste.
news.headline: Electra and Three Fires Group collaborate on Canada's first Indigenous-led battery recycling venture, Aki, to reduce waste and strengthen domestic supply chains.

news.summary: Strengthens Financial Position and Emphasizes Strategic Capital Management  The company has successfully fortified its balance sheet, demonstrating a disciplined approach to capital management. This initiative has resulted in a significant increase in available capital, with a total of approximately X amount allocated towards strengthening the financial position. This strategic move aims to enhance the company's overall resilience and sustainability in a rapidly evolving market environment.
news.headline: Lifecore Biomedical receives $10 million payment from equipment sale, strengthens balance sheet and capital management approach.

news.summary: In Brampton, Ontario, DATA Communications Management Corp. (TSX: DCM; OTCQX: DCMDF), a prominent Canadian provider of print and digital solutions aiding in simplifying complex marketing communication and workflow, shared a noteworthy achievement of its client, Atlantic Packaging Products Ltd. ("Atlantic Packaging"). Atlantic Packaging has recently reached a remarkable milestone by participating in the PrintReleaf program, successfully planting more than 50,000 trees in reforestation initiatives globally.
news.headline: DATA Communications Management Corp. announces client Atlantic Packaging planted over 50,000 trees worldwide through PrintReleaf program.

news.summary: The Global Short Term Insurance Market is forecasted to grow from $204.16 billion in 2025 to $317.01 billion by 2032, at a CAGR of 6.5%. Factors contributing to this growth include increasing healthcare costs, climate change-related natural disasters, rising awareness of insurance products, and widespread smartphone and internet usage. By 2025, homeowner insurance is expected to account for 22.7% of the market share, generating around $147.81 billion in revenue. In 2032, North America's short-term insurance market is estimated to be worth $76.15 billion, positioning it as a top player. Additionally, Asia Pacific is projected to experience the fastest growth. The demand for flexible coverage options, particularly popular among gig workers and freelancers, is driving market expansion. However, challenges like regulatory changes and fraudulent claims may hamper growth.
news.headline: Global short term insurance market to reach USD 317.01 billion by 2032 at 6.5% CAGR. North America leading with USD 76.15 billion by 2032. Regulatory challenges and fraudulent claims may hinder growth.

news.summary: A recent breakthrough in protein design and engineering has paved the way for Dotmatics to advance its comprehensive scientific intelligence strategy, aimed at speeding up multidisciplinary research and development through integrated data workflows. The innovation was announced on June 12, 2025, in Boston. Dotmatics, known for its R&D software, is at the forefront of this advancement.
news.headline: Dotmatics unveils BioGlyph Luma solution in Boston, June 12, 2025, to boost protein design & engineering, enhancing R&D workflows.

news.summary: In June 12, 2025, in Fairfield, Connecticut, Cosmetic & Reconstructive Dentistry, spearheaded by Dr. Donald Miller, is revolutionizing dental care by providing cutting-edge dental technology. This initiative is changing the landscape of dental services in Fairfield and throughout Connecticut, providing patients with an unprecedented level of care and innovation.
news.headline: Cosmetic & Reconstructive Dentistry, led by Dr. Donald Miller, offers cutting-edge dental technology in Fairfield, CT.
